more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: AFM wins Mbare church property battle as High Court slams ‘vexatious’ litigation
more.description: HARARE - The Apostolic Faith Mission in Zimbabwe has secured a decisive legal victory over a rival faction in a long-running dispute over its Mbare property, after the High Court of Zimbabwe granted summary judgement in its favour, describing the respondents’ repeated litigation as “vexatious” and without merit.The post AFM wins Mbare church property battle as High Court slams ‘vexatious’ litigation appeared first on Nehanda Radio.

more.title: From Tehran to Harare: Why a Distant War Could Reshape Zimbabwe’s Economic Landscape
more.description: When Zimbabwean officials remark that Iran is geographically far from Southern Africa, they are technically correct. Yet in the architecture of modern globalisation, distance has lost much of its protective meaning. Energy corridors, bullion markets, aviation routes and financial clearing systems bind Harare to events unfolding in the Persian Gulf. Should confrontation involving Iran, the [...]The post From Tehran to Harare: Why a Distant War Could Reshape Zimbabwe’s Economic Landscape appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.
